description_long: This object is a classic traffic cone with a tiered, cylindrical shape that tapers slightly towards the top. It features alternating horizontal bands of bright orange and white, with three orange bands and two white bands, giving it high visibility. The surface appears to have a subtle ribbed texture, likely for added grip and durability. The base is wide, black, and polygonal, providing stability and preventing tipping. The top is flat and solid, with no visible holes or attachments. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the surface, and the cone appears to be in new, clean condition.
description: A tiered orange and white traffic cone with a wide black base and ribbed texture, designed for high visibility and stability. The cone is clean and free of markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the alternating orange and white bands and the wide, black, polygonal base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlights the ribbed texture and the even spacing of the colored bands.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the others, with clear visibility of the tiered structure and flat top.
description_view_3: Final view shows the same features, emphasizing the symmetry and clean condition of the cone.
attribute_reflective_stripes: There are no reflective stripes present; the bands are colored but not reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, solid, and orange, with a smooth, rounded edge and no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, black, and polygonal, appearing thick and stable, likely made of rubber for weight and grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, clean, and free of any visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
